creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #16)
> Normally, this is where I request poudriere or redports test logs, but I
> will cut you a break. :)  

I tested it on my reference host (where it worked fine) and
using poudriere, there is an issue with pkg-config, see

http://people.freebsd.org/~pi/misc/math__ipopt-10a.txt

http://people.freebsd.org/~pi/misc/math__ipopt-91a.txt

If someone has a fix for this, that would help.
